:PROPERTIES:
:corpus-source:   Rector
:corpus-id:       R03
:corpus-severity: Important
:corpus-url:      https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-540-30202-5_5
:corpus-citation: Rector et al. (2004), "OWL Pizzas", EKAW 2004, sec. 5 (Forgetting Disjointness); Horridge, CO-ODE Pizza Tutorial v1.5, ch. 4.
:corpus-expects:  planned/rector-missing-disjointness
:corpus-rationale: Sibling classes that the author treats as
 mutually exclusive (Pizza vs. PizzaTopping) lack explicit
 owl:disjointWith, so the reasoner cannot detect contradictions
 from accidental dual membership.
:END:
#+title: Rector R03 -- missing disjointness between sibling classes

* corpus-r03
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: corpus-r03
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: corpus-r03
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex:
:header-args:omn: :tangle no
:END:
** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:
| prefix | uri                                   |
|--------+---------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#        |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# |
| ex:    | http://example.org/corpus/r03/        |

** corpus-r03 ontology (ex:corpus-r03 ex:corpus-r03/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Food (ex:Food)
 - rdfs:label :: "Food"@en
**** Pizza (ex:Pizza)
 - rdfs:label :: "Pizza"@en
**** Pizza topping (ex:PizzaTopping)
 - rdfs:label :: "Pizza topping"@en
